pageContext.name: Satoru Gojo (Kyoshiki Murasaki Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are proud to present the Satoru Gojo (Kyoshiki Murasaki Version) Collectible Figure!  From the hit manga and anime series Jujutsu Kaisen, Satoru Gojo is presented demonstrating the awesome and powerful secret extension, Kyoshiki Murasaki, or Hollow Technique: Purple. Beautiful bolts are unleashed as initiated by a hand sign, resulting in an extraordinary, yet destructive, energy wave. All of that immense power is captured here in this highly detailed deluxe figure that is sure to please diehard fans of the supernatural fantasy series!  Jujutsu Kaisen fans, be sure to add Satoru Gojo to your collection today!
